# FeatureSeries { #natural_features.FeatureSeries }

```python
FeatureSeries(
    values,
    times_s,
    dims=('time', 'feature'),
    coords=dict(),
    metadata=dict(),
    schema='FeatureSeries/v1',
    timebase=(lambda: TimebaseSpec(kind='frames'))(),
    time_bounds_s=None,
    temporal_context=TemporalContext(),
)
```
